footer.text: Ap 22:21 The grace of the Lord Jesus be with all.

carpenter.hero_title: One Symbol. One Kingdom. One Message.
carpenter.hero_text: The Kingdom Cross is a handcrafted creation with a unique, never-repeating design and an eternal purpose. Each cross holds a hidden message of faith, revealed only to those who seek it.
carpenter.hero_verse: Mt 6:33  But seek first the kingdom of God and His righteousness...
carpenter.about_text: He doesn't appear in videos or on social media. His work is simple, made of wood. Sometimes the measures fail, and other times imperfections remain. He doesn't seek applause, only prays that each piece may find the one who needs it. He comes from a small, humble town. A simple trade. Yet there's something about Him that words cannot contain. He gives His life's work so that you may be reached. Cuts, wounds, and blood, all for the sake of your salvation. He chose to suffer so that you could reach the Kingdom. He carried the Cross so that today you could receive one. He is the true Carpenter. His name is Jesus.
carpenter.about_text2: And the carpenter behind Kingdom Cross (KC) is just a man, a sinner, reached by that same Cross. He deserves no recognition, no glory. But he understood that if God could reach him, He could also use him.
carpenter.about_text3: And now, as he cuts, sands, fits, and prays, he hopes that each Cross might reach another soul with the same love that once reached him, and that her message may remain eternal in your life.
carpenter.purpose_text: The proceeds are directed toward authentic Christian projects with social, missionary, and evangelistic impact, supported by those who created the Kingdom Cross.
carpenter.purpose_mission: It's not commerce. It's a mission.
carpenter.purpose_thanks: Thank you. Through your heart, Christ is reaching many.
carpenter.faith_text: The value of the Kingdom Cross does not reside in its image, but in the message she carries, created for someone specific, with purpose and prayer.
carpenter.testimony_text: Every scratch on the wood, every drop of sweat… tells a story. This is the testimony behind the wood: a story of surrender, calling, and divine purpose.
carpenter.history_subtitle: The Cross Doesn’t Stop With You
carpenter.history_text1: The carpenter lived a life of hard work, not so different from many others. He worked late into the night, slept little, but had a blessed and faithful family. A man of faith, who doesn't drink, surrounded by friends, always ready to lend a hand to those around him.
carpenter.history_text2: He’s imperfect, like all of us.
carpenter.history_text3: God reached him many years ago, yet he still carried burdens that weighed heavily on his heart. He knew that his own anguish reflected the pain of God.
carpenter.history_text4: Everything changed on January 22, 2025, when the carpenter had a true encounter with God. In that moment, he understood he wasn’t more important than anyone else, not special in any earthly way. He simply realized the depth of God’s love for you, and how much the Lord longs to find you… just as He found him.
carpenter.history_text5: That’s how the idea for the KC 3F was born… Faith, Family, Foundation.
carpenter.kc_promise: The carpenter promises that no cross will ever be repeated, and each message is chosen in communion with prayer throughout the process of crafting the cross.
carpenter.call_title: I’ve felt the call… It’s time to choose my cross.
carpenter.coming_soon: Every cross carries a message. “Yours” is coming soon.
carpenter.coming_soon2: Soon you’ll be invited to receive “your” Kingdom Cross.

series.hero_subtitle: Choose the one that speaks to your soul
series.hero_verse: 1Co 1:18  For the message of the cross is foolishness to those who are perishing, but to us who are being saved it is the power of God.
series.golden_rule_text: Every rule may be broken after prayer, fasting, and guidance from the Holy Spirit. God may ask you to do something different. Your sensitivity to His voice is the highest law. 2 Cor 3:17 “Where the Spirit of the Lord is, there is freedom.”
series.how_to_title: How to Choose a Theme for “Your” Kingdom Cross
series.how_to_text: Each Kingdom Cross is born through three sacred steps: Theme — The desire of your soul; what you truly long for. Focus — The area in your life where you want God to move and transform you. Request — A short written description of the pain within your heart.
series.sacred_echo_text: The Carpenter will never reveal your pain, nor will He name the person behind the cross, the reason, or the one behind the prayer. Your request remains sacred.
series.choose_theme_text: The themes below are just a gateway, a starting point for your heart's journey.
series.find_title: Find the one written for you.
series.each_series: Each series carries a different mission and level of commitment.
series.choose_yours: Each Cross carries a story. ›Choose yours‹

kc3f.verse_title: Your word is a lamp for my feet, a light on my path.
kc3f.verse2: No one lights a lamp and hides it in a clay jar or puts it under a bed. Instead, they put it on a stand, so that those who come in can see the light.
kc3f.eph_text: “I am less than the least of all God’s people; yet God gave me this privilege of taking to the Gentiles the Good News about the infinite riches of Christ.”
kc3f.walk_text: Walk with Christ. Join the Kingdom Cross on this sacred path, through the shadows and the light, until we reach more hearts for the One who deserves all the glory.
kc3f.what_is_text:
A handcrafted cross. A hidden message. A mission encased in wood.

Each Kingdom Cross (KC) is handmade from wood and placed on a matching wooden base by an anonymous carpenter, every piece shaped by prayer and praise.

From its lowest point to its highest, it measures approximately 7 cm (2.76 inches), with the base averaging 4 x 4 cm (1.5 x 1.5 inches). No two pieces are alike.

No one knows what “your” cross looks like until you open the box. Her shape, her grain, the wood, whether smooth or rugged, aligned or twisted, remains hidden until she’s in your hands. They are rustic. Sometimes rough. Always with a sacred message.

Just like you, each KC is one of a kind.

“It’s not an object. It’s a calling.”

The Kingdom Cross is not for sale. She is sown into lives and homes to support Christian missions, social aid, and evangelistic work across the world.

You are not buying a cross. You are becoming part of a message.

“Each cross is unique. Each message, eternal.”
kc3f.how_receive_text:
Pray before opening your Kingdom Cross. Surrender to the message, and allow it to transform you.

Handle with care. She is rustic and delicate. Gently remove her from the base. Observe the message and the code hidden at the foot of the Cross. Then, read the letters.

All KC 3F are cataloged and carry a unique code. You may request the record associated with your cross and receive an image of the KC card in your possession, along with the letters.

The message may be for you, your family, or someone close to you. Pause. Reflect. Pray. Open the Word.

She is not a possession. She is a mission.

This is not a transaction. It’s a testimony in motion.
kc3f.matt_text: “But the seed falling on good soil refers to someone who hears the word and understands it. This is the one who produces a crop, yielding a hundred, sixty or thirty times what was sown.”
kc3f.seed_text:
Where Does Your Investment Go?

Every Kingdom Cross (KC) is handcrafted with intention, but her value goes far beyond the wood.

When you receive a KC, you invest in a Kingdom that is priceless. You’re planting a seed of purpose.

Your contribution helps:
• Fund real Christian missions and projects
• Put food on the table, a roof over someone’s head, and the Word in their hands
• Create new tools for reaching souls

You receive a message. Someone else receives hope.

This is not commerce. This is the Kingdom on Earth.
kc3f.seed_text2: The seed you plant here does not die. It grows into hope, blossoms into real help, and bears fruit in the life of someone you may never meet, but whom God already knows.
kc3f.gal_text: “Do not be deceived: God cannot be mocked. A man reaps what he sows. Whoever sows to please their flesh, from the flesh will reap destruction; whoever sows to please the Spirit, from the Spirit will reap eternal life. Let us not become weary in doing good, for at the proper time we will reap a harvest if we do not give up.”
kc3f.final_text:
The Carpenter

You will not know his name. He does not want the credit. He is merely a sinner being used as an instrument in greater hands.

Because this is not about the craftsman. It is about Jesus, the true Carpenter, who changed the world with a piece of wood, a great message, and the infinite love of the Father.

Kingdom Cross 3F

“She is fragile. Just like us. But what she carries is eternal.”

Cost: A piece of wood, time, and a little bit of blood. Price: Less than you imagine. Value: Incalculable.

“Some crosses are heavy. Others are hidden. This one was for you.”
kc3f.gal3_verse: Galatians 3:26 “For in Christ Jesus you are all sons of God, through faith.”
kc3f.call_title: I felt it in my heart… Now I want to choose my cross.

form.title: Your Kingdom Cross Request
form.subtitle: Each Kingdom Cross is handcrafted under prayer and reflection. Complete the form below, your words will guide the Carpenter to create your KC with divine purpose.
form.capacity_text: Flame Cross 2 | Faith Cross 3 | Family Cross 4 | Grace Cross 4 | Mission Cross 4
form.capacity_note: Don't worry about the delivery time; you will be notified before shipping. The Carpenter will do everything possible to get your cross to you as quickly as possible. Each cross is handmade with devotion, prayer, and adoration.
form.closed_text:
Especially KC 02/ and KC 03/

If the number of requests exceeds the number of units available in these closed series, I (the Carpenter) sincerely apologize.

In such a case, we will have a few options:
1. I will refund 100% of your payment.
2. I can create a new exclusive Limited Series.
3. If neither option feels right for you, I will contact you personally by email.

Thank you for opening this door with me.
form.founding_label: Interest in the First Crosses. Founding Cross
form.founding_desc: This Kingdom Cross was originally crafted for the Carpenter’s own journey, born from his greatest pain.
form.covenant_label: Interest in the First Crosses. Covenant Cross
form.covenant_desc: These Kingdom Crosses were originally crafted for the Carpenter’s own journey, shaped by seasons of difficulty.
form.series_required: Choose the cross that reflects your purpose.
series_options: Flame Cross  -  Supporting missions and spiritual leaders. $77,777 (Closed Series - 77 units)

Grace Cross  -  Accessible symbol of faith for all. $37.77

form.theme_desc: Select the theme that connects with your prayer.
form.focus_desc: Name the part of your soul that seeks healing, guidance, or strength.
form.message_desc: Write your prayer or describe what your heart needs. Be sincere, every word is read with purpose.
form.address_desc: Deliveries are available to most regions.
form.success: Your request has been received. The Carpenter will be in touch soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
